highlights.title: API Separation & Prefetching
highlights.problem: The user info API called on the main screen took 2–3 seconds, delaying the entire page load by the same amount.
highlights.solution:
Designed a lightweight API with the backend team, selecting only the data needed for the main screen.
Shifted the heavy existing API to root-level rendering so it runs as background prefetching.
Refactored other pages that were also redundantly calling the same API.
highlights.result: Main screen load time: 2–3s → 0.6s. Pages with redundant calls refactored to near-zero or 0.3–0.4s.

highlights.title: E2E Testing & Reinforcement Learning Integration
highlights.problem: Some features required visual inspection, making automated testing impossible with existing methods.
highlights.solution:
Mock support made E2E testing feasible, so introduced E2E (Detox) and Jest.
Wrote test code focused on key features and components.
For tests requiring visual judgment, integrated a CNN model trained with reinforcement learning.
highlights.result: Automated tests for core features and components; reduced error occurrence rate.

highlights.title: Duplicate API Removal & Cache Management with Tanstack Query
highlights.problem: APIs fetching rarely-changing values on every focus event and APIs dependent on special states were causing dozens of redundant requests per session.
highlights.solution:
Identified APIs re-fetching on every focus and those tied only to special states.
Configured Tanstack Query's stale time to block unnecessary re-fetches.
After mutations, used query client to mark related data as stale so it refetches only when needed.
Removed complex useEffect-based state management code.
highlights.result: API calls per session: dozens → 3–4; improved state management productivity.

highlights.title: API Mock Testing Feature
highlights.problem: No way to arbitrarily change frontend UI state; test account limitations made diverse scenario testing impossible.
highlights.solution:
Introduced API Mock Adaptor and implemented internal state control features for key app states.
Added mock coverage for APIs accounting for 80% of usage by log volume.
highlights.result: Increased dev productivity and reduced bug occurrence rate compared to previous workflow.

highlights.title: Bundle Optimization
highlights.problem: Test code added to the project was being included in production builds, inflating bundle size.
highlights.solution:
Used babel.config and metro.config to automatically replace test-related source files with stub files at build time.
Removed console-related code and other production-unnecessary code.
Verified optimization results using atlas and hbc map to analyze bundle output.

highlights.title: Legacy Code Cleanup & Expo Migration
highlights.problem: Play Store 16kb page issue, legacy library conflicts, and duplicated functions/components were increasing development time.
highlights.solution:
Migrated Expo 52 → 54 to resolve the 16kb issue, removing unsupported libraries and fixing dependent code.
Extracted repeated logic from key files into shared functions, hooks, and components via refactoring.
highlights.result: Page-level source code reduced to 1/4; improved maintainability and readability.

highlights.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
highlights.problem: Need arose to add automated testing to the deployment process and enable real-time OTA deployment, but no pipeline existed.
highlights.solution:
Added automated test scripts via npm commands and configured EAS build and deploy.
Added EAS channels for OTA updates and distributed an internal test app.
Configured internal test builds via babel.config and metro.config to include mock features in the bundle.
Built a 4-stage pipeline: local → internal test → final test → release.
highlights.result: Incident/bug response time: 2 days (iOS App Store review cycle) → 1 hour.
